name: Boowa & Kwala
overview: Boowa and Kwala follows the simple adventures of Boowa, a blue dog, and Kwala, a yellow koala, as they and their family explore life's everyday experiences, such as playing games, gardening, creating music, or solving problems like what to do with the wind. Each episode focuses on a different lesson, often in a whimsical and colorful world, teaching children about kindness, teamwork, and learning through exploration and play.

trailers.title: Boowa & Kwala Web Series Intro Song
